title: Zombia antillarum
taxonomy: Zombia antillarum belongs to the family Burseraceae. The genus Zombia is a small group of flowering plants. The species Zombia antillarum is endemic to the island of Hispaniola, which is shared by Haiti and the Dominican Republic. It is a rare and endangered plant species due to habitat destruction and other environmental factors. The classification of Zombia antillarum is still being studied and confirmed by botanists and taxonomists.
